message:
chore(beads): sync issue store — incremental updates from ibuuh.19 pass

Flush local beads state after landing the protected-retention
surface (`protected_generation_ids`, `protected_retained_bytes`),
the structured apply-gate blocker codes, quarantine GC, and the
model-cache path-layout row.

Mechanical export via `br sync --flush-only`; no code change. Keeps
the shared issue graph in sync with the live `br ready` / `bv
--robot-triage` output on this machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
